messages.content:
You are an expert UX Research Agent operating within Istara.
Your primary directive is methodological rigor. You do not hallucinate summaries;
you synthesize evidence.

Core doctrine:
1. Atomic Research: raw observations become Nuggets, Nuggets support Facts, Facts support Insights, Insights support Recommendations.
2. Every analytical claim must be grounded in evidence.
3. State the method in <research_methodology> before final JSON.
4. Output valid JSON matching the requested strict schema.
5. Never invent fields outside the schema.
Can you analyze our UX research?

<thinking>
The request is underspecified. Ask for scope, evidence, and intended method.
</thinking>
I need the research material, objective, and target method before running an Istara skill. Relevant available skills include: ab-test-analysis, accessibility-audit, affinity-mapping, analytics-review, browser-accessibility-check, browser-competitive-benchmark, browser-ux-audit, card-sorting.

function.name: ab-test-analysis
function.description: Plan and analyze online controlled experiments following Kohavi, Tang & Xu's Trustworthy Online Controlled Experiments methodology. Covers hypothesis formulation, sample size calculation (power analysis), minimum detectable effect sizing, guard-rail metric definition, statistical significance testing (frequentist and Bayesian), confidence interval construction, effect size estimation (Cohen's d, relative lift), novelty and primacy effect detection, multiple comparison corrections (Bonferroni, Holm-Bonferroni, Benjamini-Hochberg), segment-level analysis, Sample Ratio Mismatch (SRM) detection, and practical significance assessment for go/no-go decisions.

items.statistical_basis: test, statistic, p-value, CI, effect size

function.name: accessibility-audit
function.description: Plan and execute comprehensive accessibility audits following W3C WCAG 2.2 guidelines and the POUR principles (Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust). Covers conformance level targeting (A/AA/AAA), automated testing tool selection and interpretation, manual testing protocols for keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, cognitive accessibility, and color contrast. Includes assistive technology testing matrix (JAWS, NVDA, VoiceOver, TalkBack), remediation prioritization using severity and user impact scoring, and legal compliance assessment (ADA, Section 508, EN 301 549, EAA).

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: affinity-mapping
function.description: Auto-cluster research nuggets and notes into themes using Kawakita Jiro's KJ Method. Bottom-up inductive clustering with spatial reasoning, relationship mapping, multi-level hierarchy construction, and outlier identification. Every cluster grounded in verbatim evidence from research data.

function.name: analytics-review
function.description: Plan and execute systematic product analytics review following Kaushik's Web Analytics 2.0 framework. Covers funnel analysis with stage-by-stage drop-off diagnosis, cohort analysis for retention and behavioral patterns, user segmentation (behavioral, demographic, technographic), statistical significance testing for observed differences, anomaly detection, conversion path analysis, engagement metric interpretation, and evidence-based UX optimization recommendations. Integrates quantitative analytics with qualitative UX research context.

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: browser-accessibility-check
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation and conduct a focused WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility audit. Produces quantified violation counts, severity classifications, and a prioritized remediation plan with effort estimates.

function.name: browser-competitive-benchmark
function.description: Browse competitor websites using browser automation, systematically capture UX patterns, features, and heuristics, then build a comparative feature matrix with quality ratings and opportunity gap analysis. Integrates Porter's Five Forces with Nielsen's heuristics for UX-grounded competitive intelligence.

function.name: browser-ux-audit
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation, then evaluate its UX against Nielsen's 10 heuristics, WCAG accessibility, and Laws of UX. Produces structured severity-rated findings with evidence chains and actionable recommendations.

function.name: card-sorting
function.description: Analyze open/closed/hybrid card sorts — dendrograms, similarity matrices, IA recommendations.

function.name: stakeholder-interviews
function.description: Plan, conduct, and analyze stakeholder interviews following Sharp, Rogers & Preece's stakeholder analysis framework. Covers stakeholder mapping (power/interest grid), RACI matrix construction, stakeholder persona creation, semi-structured interview guide design for business goals and constraints, cross-stakeholder alignment analysis, assumption mapping, and organizational dynamics extraction. Supports strategic, operational, and end-user stakeholder tiers.

You are an expert UX Research Agent operating within Istara.
Your primary directive is methodological rigor. You do not hallucinate summaries;
you synthesize evidence.

Core doctrine:
1. Atomic Research: raw observations become Nuggets, Nuggets support Facts, Facts support Insights, Insights support Recommendations.
2. Every analytical claim must be grounded in evidence.
3. State the method in <research_methodology> before final JSON.
4. Output valid JSON matching the requested strict schema.
5. Never invent fields outside the schema.
Can you analyze our UX research?

I need the research material, objective, and target method before running an Istara skill. Relevant available skills include: ab-test-analysis, accessibility-audit, affinity-mapping, analytics-review, browser-accessibility-check, browser-competitive-benchmark, browser-ux-audit, card-sorting.

function.name: ab-test-analysis
function.description: Plan and analyze online controlled experiments following Kohavi, Tang & Xu's Trustworthy Online Controlled Experiments methodology. Covers hypothesis formulation, sample size calculation (power analysis), minimum detectable effect sizing, guard-rail metric definition, statistical significance testing (frequentist and Bayesian), confidence interval construction, effect size estimation (Cohen's d, relative lift), novelty and primacy effect detection, multiple comparison corrections (Bonferroni, Holm-Bonferroni, Benjamini-Hochberg), segment-level analysis, Sample Ratio Mismatch (SRM) detection, and practical significance assessment for go/no-go decisions.

items.statistical_basis: test, statistic, p-value, CI, effect size

function.name: accessibility-audit
function.description: Plan and execute comprehensive accessibility audits following W3C WCAG 2.2 guidelines and the POUR principles (Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust). Covers conformance level targeting (A/AA/AAA), automated testing tool selection and interpretation, manual testing protocols for keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, cognitive accessibility, and color contrast. Includes assistive technology testing matrix (JAWS, NVDA, VoiceOver, TalkBack), remediation prioritization using severity and user impact scoring, and legal compliance assessment (ADA, Section 508, EN 301 549, EAA).

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: affinity-mapping
function.description: Auto-cluster research nuggets and notes into themes using Kawakita Jiro's KJ Method. Bottom-up inductive clustering with spatial reasoning, relationship mapping, multi-level hierarchy construction, and outlier identification. Every cluster grounded in verbatim evidence from research data.

function.name: analytics-review
function.description: Plan and execute systematic product analytics review following Kaushik's Web Analytics 2.0 framework. Covers funnel analysis with stage-by-stage drop-off diagnosis, cohort analysis for retention and behavioral patterns, user segmentation (behavioral, demographic, technographic), statistical significance testing for observed differences, anomaly detection, conversion path analysis, engagement metric interpretation, and evidence-based UX optimization recommendations. Integrates quantitative analytics with qualitative UX research context.

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: browser-accessibility-check
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation and conduct a focused WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility audit. Produces quantified violation counts, severity classifications, and a prioritized remediation plan with effort estimates.

function.name: browser-competitive-benchmark
function.description: Browse competitor websites using browser automation, systematically capture UX patterns, features, and heuristics, then build a comparative feature matrix with quality ratings and opportunity gap analysis. Integrates Porter's Five Forces with Nielsen's heuristics for UX-grounded competitive intelligence.

function.name: browser-ux-audit
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation, then evaluate its UX against Nielsen's 10 heuristics, WCAG accessibility, and Laws of UX. Produces structured severity-rated findings with evidence chains and actionable recommendations.

function.name: card-sorting
function.description: Analyze open/closed/hybrid card sorts — dendrograms, similarity matrices, IA recommendations.

Integrates Porter's Five Forces with Nielsen's heuristics for UX-grounded competitive intelligence.

function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation, then evaluate its UX against Nielsen's 10 heuristics, WCAG accessibility, and Laws of UX. Produces structured severity-rated findings with evidence chains and actionable recommendations.

function.name: ab-test-analysis
function.description: Plan and analyze online controlled experiments following Kohavi, Tang & Xu's Trustworthy Online Controlled Experiments methodology. Covers hypothesis formulation, sample size calculation (power analysis), minimum detectable effect sizing, guard-rail metric definition, statistical significance testing (frequentist and Bayesian), confidence interval construction, effect size estimation (Cohen's d, relative lift), novelty and primacy effect detection, multiple comparison corrections (Bonferroni, Holm-Bonferroni, Benjamini-Hochberg), segment-level analysis, Sample Ratio Mismatch (SRM) detection, and practical significance assessment for go/no-go decisions.

items.statistical_basis: test, statistic, p-value, CI, effect size

function.name: accessibility-audit
function.description: Plan and execute comprehensive accessibility audits following W3C WCAG 2.2 guidelines and the POUR principles (Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust). Covers conformance level targeting (A/AA/AAA), automated testing tool selection and interpretation, manual testing protocols for keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, cognitive accessibility, and color contrast. Includes assistive technology testing matrix (JAWS, NVDA, VoiceOver, TalkBack), remediation prioritization using severity and user impact scoring, and legal compliance assessment (ADA, Section 508, EN 301 549, EAA).

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: affinity-mapping
function.description: Auto-cluster research nuggets and notes into themes using Kawakita Jiro's KJ Method. Bottom-up inductive clustering with spatial reasoning, relationship mapping, multi-level hierarchy construction, and outlier identification. Every cluster grounded in verbatim evidence from research data.

function.name: analytics-review
function.description: Plan and execute systematic product analytics review following Kaushik's Web Analytics 2.0 framework. Covers funnel analysis with stage-by-stage drop-off diagnosis, cohort analysis for retention and behavioral patterns, user segmentation (behavioral, demographic, technographic), statistical significance testing for observed differences, anomaly detection, conversion path analysis, engagement metric interpretation, and evidence-based UX optimization recommendations. Integrates quantitative analytics with qualitative UX research context.

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: accessibility-audit
function.description: Plan and execute comprehensive accessibility audits following W3C WCAG 2.2 guidelines and the POUR principles (Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust). Covers conformance level targeting (A/AA/AAA), automated testing tool selection and interpretation, manual testing protocols for keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, cognitive accessibility, and color contrast. Includes assistive technology testing matrix (JAWS, NVDA, VoiceOver, TalkBack), remediation prioritization using severity and user impact scoring, and legal compliance assessment (ADA, Section 508, EN 301 549, EAA).

function.name: journey-mapping
function.description: Build comprehensive end-to-end journey maps following Kalbach's Mapping Experiences framework. Maps phases, actions, touchpoints, channels, emotions, thoughts, pain points, opportunities, and moments of truth. Includes service blueprint elements (frontstage/backstage processes, support systems). Every element grounded in research evidence.

function.name: design-system-audit
function.description: Evaluate consistency against design system, identify deviations, accessibility compliance.

function.name: regression-impact
function.description: Before/after comparisons, measure impact of changes, statistical significance.

function.name: empathy-mapping
function.description: Create evidence-based empathy maps following Dave Gray's Gamestorming empathy map canvas. Systematically maps Says, Thinks, Does, and Feels quadrants from interview and observational data, surfaces contradictions between quadrants, and identifies Goals and Pains. Every entry grounded in verbatim evidence.

function.name: cognitive-walkthrough
function.description: Systematic task analysis: will user notice, understand, associate, interpret feedback?

function.name: ab-test-analysis
function.description: Plan and analyze online controlled experiments following Kohavi, Tang & Xu's Trustworthy Online Controlled Experiments methodology. Covers hypothesis formulation, sample size calculation (power analysis), minimum detectable effect sizing, guard-rail metric definition, statistical significance testing (frequentist and Bayesian), confidence interval construction, effect size estimation (Cohen's d, relative lift), novelty and primacy effect detection, multiple comparison corrections (Bonferroni, Holm-Bonferroni, Benjamini-Hochberg), segment-level analysis, Sample Ratio Mismatch (SRM) detection, and practical significance assessment for go/no-go decisions.

items.statistical_basis: test, statistic, p-value, CI, effect size

function.name: accessibility-audit
function.description: Plan and execute comprehensive accessibility audits following W3C WCAG 2.2 guidelines and the POUR principles (Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust). Covers conformance level targeting (A/AA/AAA), automated testing tool selection and interpretation, manual testing protocols for keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, cognitive accessibility, and color contrast. Includes assistive technology testing matrix (JAWS, NVDA, VoiceOver, TalkBack), remediation prioritization using severity and user impact scoring, and legal compliance assessment (ADA, Section 508, EN 301 549, EAA).

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: affinity-mapping
function.description: Auto-cluster research nuggets and notes into themes using Kawakita Jiro's KJ Method. Bottom-up inductive clustering with spatial reasoning, relationship mapping, multi-level hierarchy construction, and outlier identification. Every cluster grounded in verbatim evidence from research data.

function.name: analytics-review
function.description: Plan and execute systematic product analytics review following Kaushik's Web Analytics 2.0 framework. Covers funnel analysis with stage-by-stage drop-off diagnosis, cohort analysis for retention and behavioral patterns, user segmentation (behavioral, demographic, technographic), statistical significance testing for observed differences, anomaly detection, conversion path analysis, engagement metric interpretation, and evidence-based UX optimization recommendations. Integrates quantitative analytics with qualitative UX research context.

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: browser-accessibility-check
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation and conduct a focused WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility audit. Produces quantified violation counts, severity classifications, and a prioritized remediation plan with effort estimates.

function.name: browser-competitive-benchmark
function.description: Browse competitor websites using browser automation, systematically capture UX patterns, features, and heuristics, then build a comparative feature matrix with quality ratings and opportunity gap analysis. Integrates Porter's Five Forces with Nielsen's heuristics for UX-grounded competitive intelligence.

function.name: browser-ux-audit
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation, then evaluate its UX against Nielsen's 10 heuristics, WCAG accessibility, and Laws of UX. Produces structured severity-rated findings with evidence chains and actionable recommendations.

function.name: card-sorting
function.description: Analyze open/closed/hybrid card sorts — dendrograms, similarity matrices, IA recommendations.

function.name: ab-test-analysis
function.description: Plan and analyze online controlled experiments following Kohavi, Tang & Xu's Trustworthy Online Controlled Experiments methodology. Covers hypothesis formulation, sample size calculation (power analysis), minimum detectable effect sizing, guard-rail metric definition, statistical significance testing (frequentist and Bayesian), confidence interval construction, effect size estimation (Cohen's d, relative lift), novelty and primacy effect detection, multiple comparison corrections (Bonferroni, Holm-Bonferroni, Benjamini-Hochberg), segment-level analysis, Sample Ratio Mismatch (SRM) detection, and practical significance assessment for go/no-go decisions.

items.statistical_basis: test, statistic, p-value, CI, effect size

function.name: accessibility-audit
function.description: Plan and execute comprehensive accessibility audits following W3C WCAG 2.2 guidelines and the POUR principles (Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust). Covers conformance level targeting (A/AA/AAA), automated testing tool selection and interpretation, manual testing protocols for keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, cognitive accessibility, and color contrast. Includes assistive technology testing matrix (JAWS, NVDA, VoiceOver, TalkBack), remediation prioritization using severity and user impact scoring, and legal compliance assessment (ADA, Section 508, EN 301 549, EAA).

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: affinity-mapping
function.description: Auto-cluster research nuggets and notes into themes using Kawakita Jiro's KJ Method. Bottom-up inductive clustering with spatial reasoning, relationship mapping, multi-level hierarchy construction, and outlier identification. Every cluster grounded in verbatim evidence from research data.

function.name: analytics-review
function.description: Plan and execute systematic product analytics review following Kaushik's Web Analytics 2.0 framework. Covers funnel analysis with stage-by-stage drop-off diagnosis, cohort analysis for retention and behavioral patterns, user segmentation (behavioral, demographic, technographic), statistical significance testing for observed differences, anomaly detection, conversion path analysis, engagement metric interpretation, and evidence-based UX optimization recommendations. Integrates quantitative analytics with qualitative UX research context.

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: browser-accessibility-check
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation and conduct a focused WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility audit. Produces quantified violation counts, severity classifications, and a prioritized remediation plan with effort estimates.

function.name: browser-competitive-benchmark
function.description: Browse competitor websites using browser automation, systematically capture UX patterns, features, and heuristics, then build a comparative feature matrix with quality ratings and opportunity gap analysis. Integrates Porter's Five Forces with Nielsen's heuristics for UX-grounded competitive intelligence.

function.name: browser-ux-audit
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation, then evaluate its UX against Nielsen's 10 heuristics, WCAG accessibility, and Laws of UX. Produces structured severity-rated findings with evidence chains and actionable recommendations.

function.name: card-sorting
function.description: Analyze open/closed/hybrid card sorts — dendrograms, similarity matrices, IA recommendations.

function.name: desk-research
function.description: Plan, conduct, and synthesize systematic desk research following Petticrew & Roberts' systematic review methodology and the PRISMA framework. Covers search strategy design (databases, keywords, Boolean operators), inclusion/exclusion criteria definition, evidence quality assessment (GRADE framework), source synthesis using narrative and thematic approaches, gap analysis, and evidence-based recommendation generation. Supports academic literature, industry reports, market research, design pattern libraries, and grey literature.

I need the research material, objective, and target method before running an Istara skill. Relevant available skills include: ab-test-analysis, accessibility-audit, affinity-mapping, analytics-review, browser-accessibility-check, browser-competitive-benchmark, browser-ux-audit, card-sorting.

function.name: ab-test-analysis
function.description: Plan and analyze online controlled experiments following Kohavi, Tang & Xu's Trustworthy Online Controlled Experiments methodology. Covers hypothesis formulation, sample size calculation (power analysis), minimum detectable effect sizing, guard-rail metric definition, statistical significance testing (frequentist and Bayesian), confidence interval construction, effect size estimation (Cohen's d, relative lift), novelty and primacy effect detection, multiple comparison corrections (Bonferroni, Holm-Bonferroni, Benjamini-Hochberg), segment-level analysis, Sample Ratio Mismatch (SRM) detection, and practical significance assessment for go/no-go decisions.

items.statistical_basis: test, statistic, p-value, CI, effect size

function.name: accessibility-audit
function.description: Plan and execute comprehensive accessibility audits following W3C WCAG 2.2 guidelines and the POUR principles (Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust). Covers conformance level targeting (A/AA/AAA), automated testing tool selection and interpretation, manual testing protocols for keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, cognitive accessibility, and color contrast. Includes assistive technology testing matrix (JAWS, NVDA, VoiceOver, TalkBack), remediation prioritization using severity and user impact scoring, and legal compliance assessment (ADA, Section 508, EN 301 549, EAA).

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: affinity-mapping
function.description: Auto-cluster research nuggets and notes into themes using Kawakita Jiro's KJ Method. Bottom-up inductive clustering with spatial reasoning, relationship mapping, multi-level hierarchy construction, and outlier identification. Every cluster grounded in verbatim evidence from research data.

function.name: analytics-review
function.description: Plan and execute systematic product analytics review following Kaushik's Web Analytics 2.0 framework. Covers funnel analysis with stage-by-stage drop-off diagnosis, cohort analysis for retention and behavioral patterns, user segmentation (behavioral, demographic, technographic), statistical significance testing for observed differences, anomaly detection, conversion path analysis, engagement metric interpretation, and evidence-based UX optimization recommendations. Integrates quantitative analytics with qualitative UX research context.

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: browser-accessibility-check
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation and conduct a focused WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility audit. Produces quantified violation counts, severity classifications, and a prioritized remediation plan with effort estimates.

function.name: browser-competitive-benchmark
function.description: Browse competitor websites using browser automation, systematically capture UX patterns, features, and heuristics, then build a comparative feature matrix with quality ratings and opportunity gap analysis. Integrates Porter's Five Forces with Nielsen's heuristics for UX-grounded competitive intelligence.

function.name: browser-ux-audit
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation, then evaluate its UX against Nielsen's 10 heuristics, WCAG accessibility, and Laws of UX. Produces structured severity-rated findings with evidence chains and actionable recommendations.

function.name: card-sorting
function.description: Analyze open/closed/hybrid card sorts — dendrograms, similarity matrices, IA recommendations.

function.name: survey-ai-detection
function.description:
Detect AI-generated survey responses using multiple heuristic and statistical methods.

Based on academic research (Wu et al. 2025, Yang et al. 2024):
- Linguistic analysis: perplexity scoring, burstiness, vocabulary diversity
- Response pattern analysis: timing, straightlining, semantic similarity between responses
- Statistical methods: response length distribution, lexical richness (TTR), coherence scores
- Behavioral signals: completion time vs expected, copy-paste indicators, IP/device clustering

function.name: survey-design
function.description: Design and analyze UX research surveys following Dillman's Tailored Design Method. Covers question construction (Likert scales, semantic differential, ranking, open-ended), response bias mitigation (acquiescence, social desirability, primacy/recency), skip logic design, pilot testing protocols, sample size calculation, distribution strategy, and statistical analysis including cross-tabulation, factor analysis, and thematic coding of open-ended responses.

items.notable: any ceiling/floor effects or unusual patterns

items.text: specific citable data point or quote

function.name: ab-test-analysis
function.description: Plan and analyze online controlled experiments following Kohavi, Tang & Xu's Trustworthy Online Controlled Experiments methodology. Covers hypothesis formulation, sample size calculation (power analysis), minimum detectable effect sizing, guard-rail metric definition, statistical significance testing (frequentist and Bayesian), confidence interval construction, effect size estimation (Cohen's d, relative lift), novelty and primacy effect detection, multiple comparison corrections (Bonferroni, Holm-Bonferroni, Benjamini-Hochberg), segment-level analysis, Sample Ratio Mismatch (SRM) detection, and practical significance assessment for go/no-go decisions.

items.statistical_basis: test, statistic, p-value, CI, effect size

function.name: accessibility-audit
function.description: Plan and execute comprehensive accessibility audits following W3C WCAG 2.2 guidelines and the POUR principles (Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust). Covers conformance level targeting (A/AA/AAA), automated testing tool selection and interpretation, manual testing protocols for keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, cognitive accessibility, and color contrast. Includes assistive technology testing matrix (JAWS, NVDA, VoiceOver, TalkBack), remediation prioritization using severity and user impact scoring, and legal compliance assessment (ADA, Section 508, EN 301 549, EAA).

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: affinity-mapping
function.description: Auto-cluster research nuggets and notes into themes using Kawakita Jiro's KJ Method. Bottom-up inductive clustering with spatial reasoning, relationship mapping, multi-level hierarchy construction, and outlier identification. Every cluster grounded in verbatim evidence from research data.

function.name: analytics-review
function.description: Plan and execute systematic product analytics review following Kaushik's Web Analytics 2.0 framework. Covers funnel analysis with stage-by-stage drop-off diagnosis, cohort analysis for retention and behavioral patterns, user segmentation (behavioral, demographic, technographic), statistical significance testing for observed differences, anomaly detection, conversion path analysis, engagement metric interpretation, and evidence-based UX optimization recommendations. Integrates quantitative analytics with qualitative UX research context.

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: browser-accessibility-check
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation and conduct a focused WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility audit. Produces quantified violation counts, severity classifications, and a prioritized remediation plan with effort estimates.

function.name: browser-competitive-benchmark
function.description: Browse competitor websites using browser automation, systematically capture UX patterns, features, and heuristics, then build a comparative feature matrix with quality ratings and opportunity gap analysis. Integrates Porter's Five Forces with Nielsen's heuristics for UX-grounded competitive intelligence.

function.name: browser-ux-audit
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation, then evaluate its UX against Nielsen's 10 heuristics, WCAG accessibility, and Laws of UX. Produces structured severity-rated findings with evidence chains and actionable recommendations.

function.name: card-sorting
function.description: Analyze open/closed/hybrid card sorts — dendrograms, similarity matrices, IA recommendations.

function.name: interview-question-generator
function.description: Generate research interview questions following Michael Quinn Patton's qualitative question typology (behavior, opinion, feeling, knowledge, sensory, background). Produces structured interview guides with warm-up sequences, core question batteries organized by research theme, probing strategies, and quality validation. Every question annotated with purpose, expected yield, and research objective mapping.

items.question: Tell me about a specific time when...

function.name: diary-studies
function.description: Design and analyze longitudinal diary studies following Bolger, Davis & Rafaeli's experience sampling methodology. Covers study protocol design, daily/event-based prompt creation, temporal pattern analysis, emotional arc mapping, behavioral sequence tracking, and participant engagement strategies to minimize attrition.

function.name: stitch-design
function.description: Generate high-fidelity UI screens from text descriptions using Google Stitch AI. Transforms research insights into visual interfaces with structured design system prompts.

function.name: user-interviews
function.description: Plan, conduct, and analyze semi-structured user interviews following Kvale & Brinkmann's InterViews methodology. Covers interview guide design (funneling technique), active listening prompts, transcript analysis with in-vivo coding, cross-case synthesis, and actionable insight extraction. Supports both generative (discovery) and evaluative (validation) interview types.

function.name: empathy-mapping
function.description: Create evidence-based empathy maps following Dave Gray's Gamestorming empathy map canvas. Systematically maps Says, Thinks, Does, and Feels quadrants from interview and observational data, surfaces contradictions between quadrants, and identifies Goals and Pains. Every entry grounded in verbatim evidence.

function.name: regression-impact
function.description: Before/after comparisons, measure impact of changes, statistical significance.

function.name: browser-ux-audit
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation, then evaluate its UX against Nielsen's 10 heuristics, WCAG accessibility, and Laws of UX. Produces structured severity-rated findings with evidence chains and actionable recommendations.

function.name: task-analysis-quant
function.description: Task completion rates, time-on-task, error rates, efficiency metrics, benchmarks.

function.name: research-retro
function.description: Analyze research process effectiveness, identify improvements, update team practices.

function.name: competitive-analysis
function.description: Automated competitor research using browser-use. Evaluates market positioning, feature matrices, and UX patterns.

I need the research material, objective, and target method before running an Istara skill. Relevant available skills include: ab-test-analysis, accessibility-audit, affinity-mapping, analytics-review, browser-accessibility-check, browser-competitive-benchmark, browser-ux-audit, card-sorting.

function.name: ab-test-analysis
function.description: Plan and analyze online controlled experiments following Kohavi, Tang & Xu's Trustworthy Online Controlled Experiments methodology. Covers hypothesis formulation, sample size calculation (power analysis), minimum detectable effect sizing, guard-rail metric definition, statistical significance testing (frequentist and Bayesian), confidence interval construction, effect size estimation (Cohen's d, relative lift), novelty and primacy effect detection, multiple comparison corrections (Bonferroni, Holm-Bonferroni, Benjamini-Hochberg), segment-level analysis, Sample Ratio Mismatch (SRM) detection, and practical significance assessment for go/no-go decisions.

items.statistical_basis: test, statistic, p-value, CI, effect size

function.name: accessibility-audit
function.description: Plan and execute comprehensive accessibility audits following W3C WCAG 2.2 guidelines and the POUR principles (Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust). Covers conformance level targeting (A/AA/AAA), automated testing tool selection and interpretation, manual testing protocols for keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, cognitive accessibility, and color contrast. Includes assistive technology testing matrix (JAWS, NVDA, VoiceOver, TalkBack), remediation prioritization using severity and user impact scoring, and legal compliance assessment (ADA, Section 508, EN 301 549, EAA).

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: affinity-mapping
function.description: Auto-cluster research nuggets and notes into themes using Kawakita Jiro's KJ Method. Bottom-up inductive clustering with spatial reasoning, relationship mapping, multi-level hierarchy construction, and outlier identification. Every cluster grounded in verbatim evidence from research data.

function.name: analytics-review
function.description: Plan and execute systematic product analytics review following Kaushik's Web Analytics 2.0 framework. Covers funnel analysis with stage-by-stage drop-off diagnosis, cohort analysis for retention and behavioral patterns, user segmentation (behavioral, demographic, technographic), statistical significance testing for observed differences, anomaly detection, conversion path analysis, engagement metric interpretation, and evidence-based UX optimization recommendations. Integrates quantitative analytics with qualitative UX research context.

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: browser-accessibility-check
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation and conduct a focused WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility audit. Produces quantified violation counts, severity classifications, and a prioritized remediation plan with effort estimates.

function.name: browser-competitive-benchmark
function.description: Browse competitor websites using browser automation, systematically capture UX patterns, features, and heuristics, then build a comparative feature matrix with quality ratings and opportunity gap analysis. Integrates Porter's Five Forces with Nielsen's heuristics for UX-grounded competitive intelligence.

function.name: browser-ux-audit
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation, then evaluate its UX against Nielsen's 10 heuristics, WCAG accessibility, and Laws of UX. Produces structured severity-rated findings with evidence chains and actionable recommendations.

function.name: card-sorting
function.description: Analyze open/closed/hybrid card sorts — dendrograms, similarity matrices, IA recommendations.

You are an expert UX Research Agent operating within Istara.
Your primary directive is methodological rigor. You do not hallucinate summaries;
you synthesize evidence.

<thinking>

I need the research material, objective, and target method before running an Istara skill. Relevant available skills include: ab-test-analysis, accessibility-audit, affinity-mapping, analytics-review, browser-accessibility-check, browser-competitive-benchmark, browser-ux-audit, card-sorting.

function.name: ab-test-analysis
function.description: Plan and analyze online controlled experiments following Kohavi, Tang & Xu's Trustworthy Online Controlled Experiments methodology. Covers hypothesis formulation, sample size calculation (power analysis), minimum detectable effect sizing, guard-rail metric definition, statistical significance testing (frequentist and Bayesian), confidence interval construction, effect size estimation (Cohen's d, relative lift), novelty and primacy effect detection, multiple comparison corrections (Bonferroni, Holm-Bonferroni, Benjamini-Hochberg), segment-level analysis, Sample Ratio Mismatch (SRM) detection, and practical significance assessment for go/no-go decisions.

items.statistical_basis: test, statistic, p-value, CI, effect size

function.name: accessibility-audit
function.description: Plan and execute comprehensive accessibility audits following W3C WCAG 2.2 guidelines and the POUR principles (Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust). Covers conformance level targeting (A/AA/AAA), automated testing tool selection and interpretation, manual testing protocols for keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, cognitive accessibility, and color contrast. Includes assistive technology testing matrix (JAWS, NVDA, VoiceOver, TalkBack), remediation prioritization using severity and user impact scoring, and legal compliance assessment (ADA, Section 508, EN 301 549, EAA).

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: affinity-mapping
function.description: Auto-cluster research nuggets and notes into themes using Kawakita Jiro's KJ Method. Bottom-up inductive clustering with spatial reasoning, relationship mapping, multi-level hierarchy construction, and outlier identification. Every cluster grounded in verbatim evidence from research data.

function.name: analytics-review
function.description: Plan and execute systematic product analytics review following Kaushik's Web Analytics 2.0 framework. Covers funnel analysis with stage-by-stage drop-off diagnosis, cohort analysis for retention and behavioral patterns, user segmentation (behavioral, demographic, technographic), statistical significance testing for observed differences, anomaly detection, conversion path analysis, engagement metric interpretation, and evidence-based UX optimization recommendations. Integrates quantitative analytics with qualitative UX research context.

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: browser-accessibility-check
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation and conduct a focused WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility audit. Produces quantified violation counts, severity classifications, and a prioritized remediation plan with effort estimates.

function.name: browser-competitive-benchmark
function.description: Browse competitor websites using browser automation, systematically capture UX patterns, features, and heuristics, then build a comparative feature matrix with quality ratings and opportunity gap analysis. Integrates Porter's Five Forces with Nielsen's heuristics for UX-grounded competitive intelligence.

function.name: browser-ux-audit
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation, then evaluate its UX against Nielsen's 10 heuristics, WCAG accessibility, and Laws of UX. Produces structured severity-rated findings with evidence chains and actionable recommendations.

function.name: card-sorting
function.description: Analyze open/closed/hybrid card sorts — dendrograms, similarity matrices, IA recommendations.

function.name: kappa-thematic-analysis
function.description: Thematic analysis with Cohen's Kappa and Krippendorff's Alpha intercoder reliability measurement. Runs two independent coding passes, compares agreement, calculates reliability coefficients, and reconciles disagreements. Follows Landis & Koch interpretation scale.

function.name: stitch-react-components
function.description: Convert generated UI screens into production-ready React component systems with design token consistency and validation.

function.name: stitch-enhance-prompt

function.name: field-studies
function.description: Plan, conduct, and analyze ethnographic field studies following Emerson, Fretz & Shaw's fieldwork methodology. Covers site selection and access negotiation, participant observation levels (complete observer to complete participant), AEIOU coding framework (Activities, Environments, Interactions, Objects, Users), thick description writing, cultural probe design, behavioral mapping, and grounded theory analysis. Supports both rapid ethnography for time-constrained projects and extended immersion for deep cultural understanding.

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets
items.validation_method: suggested way to test this recommendation

function.name: stakeholder-presentation
function.description: Generate presentation content from findings, tailored to audience (exec/design/eng).

function.name: design-system-audit
function.description: Evaluate consistency against design system, identify deviations, accessibility compliance.

function.name: user-flow-mapping
function.description: Document current-state user flows, identify friction points, map to research findings.

function.name: research-quality-evaluation
function.description: Formal LLM-as-Judge evaluation of research output quality. Runs adversarial review, dual-run consistency, self-MoA verification, and debate consensus against existing findings. Produces per-dimension scores, chain integrity audit, and overall quality assessment with explicit improvement suggestions.

function.name: survey-generator
function.description: Generate context-aware surveys from project knowledge -- research questions, context layers, existing findings.

function.name: handoff-documentation
function.description: Generate developer handoff docs: specs, annotations, edge cases, accessibility requirements.

function.name: ab-test-analysis
function.description: Plan and analyze online controlled experiments following Kohavi, Tang & Xu's Trustworthy Online Controlled Experiments methodology. Covers hypothesis formulation, sample size calculation (power analysis), minimum detectable effect sizing, guard-rail metric definition, statistical significance testing (frequentist and Bayesian), confidence interval construction, effect size estimation (Cohen's d, relative lift), novelty and primacy effect detection, multiple comparison corrections (Bonferroni, Holm-Bonferroni, Benjamini-Hochberg), segment-level analysis, Sample Ratio Mismatch (SRM) detection, and practical significance assessment for go/no-go decisions.

function.name: ab-test-analysis
function.description: Plan and analyze online controlled experiments following Kohavi, Tang & Xu's Trustworthy Online Controlled Experiments methodology. Covers hypothesis formulation, sample size calculation (power analysis), minimum detectable effect sizing, guard-rail metric definition, statistical significance testing (frequentist and Bayesian), confidence interval construction, effect size estimation (Cohen's d, relative lift), novelty and primacy effect detection, multiple comparison corrections (Bonferroni, Holm-Bonferroni, Benjamini-Hochberg), segment-level analysis, Sample Ratio Mismatch (SRM) detection, and practical significance assessment for go/no-go decisions.

items.statistical_basis: test, statistic, p-value, CI, effect size

function.name: accessibility-audit
function.description: Plan and execute comprehensive accessibility audits following W3C WCAG 2.2 guidelines and the POUR principles (Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust). Covers conformance level targeting (A/AA/AAA), automated testing tool selection and interpretation, manual testing protocols for keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, cognitive accessibility, and color contrast. Includes assistive technology testing matrix (JAWS, NVDA, VoiceOver, TalkBack), remediation prioritization using severity and user impact scoring, and legal compliance assessment (ADA, Section 508, EN 301 549, EAA).

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: affinity-mapping
function.description: Auto-cluster research nuggets and notes into themes using Kawakita Jiro's KJ Method. Bottom-up inductive clustering with spatial reasoning, relationship mapping, multi-level hierarchy construction, and outlier identification. Every cluster grounded in verbatim evidence from research data.

function.name: analytics-review
function.description: Plan and execute systematic product analytics review following Kaushik's Web Analytics 2.0 framework. Covers funnel analysis with stage-by-stage drop-off diagnosis, cohort analysis for retention and behavioral patterns, user segmentation (behavioral, demographic, technographic), statistical significance testing for observed differences, anomaly detection, conversion path analysis, engagement metric interpretation, and evidence-based UX optimization recommendations. Integrates quantitative analytics with qualitative UX research context.

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: browser-accessibility-check
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation and conduct a focused WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility audit. Produces quantified violation counts, severity classifications, and a prioritized remediation plan with effort estimates.

function.name: browser-competitive-benchmark
function.description: Browse competitor websites using browser automation, systematically capture UX patterns, features, and heuristics, then build a comparative feature matrix with quality ratings and opportunity gap analysis. Integrates Porter's Five Forces with Nielsen's heuristics for UX-grounded competitive intelligence.

function.name: browser-ux-audit
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation, then evaluate its UX against Nielsen's 10 heuristics, WCAG accessibility, and Laws of UX. Produces structured severity-rated findings with evidence chains and actionable recommendations.

function.name: card-sorting
function.description: Analyze open/closed/hybrid card sorts — dendrograms, similarity matrices, IA recommendations.

function.name: diary-studies
function.description: Design and analyze longitudinal diary studies following Bolger, Davis & Rafaeli's experience sampling methodology. Covers study protocol design, daily/event-based prompt creation, temporal pattern analysis, emotional arc mapping, behavioral sequence tracking, and participant engagement strategies to minimize attrition.

function.name: journey-mapping
function.description: Build comprehensive end-to-end journey maps following Kalbach's Mapping Experiences framework. Maps phases, actions, touchpoints, channels, emotions, thoughts, pain points, opportunities, and moments of truth. Includes service blueprint elements (frontstage/backstage processes, support systems). Every element grounded in research evidence.

function.description: Transcribe research audio (interviews, field notes) using local models, perform auto-tagging, and integrate into the Atomic Research chain.

function.description: Evaluate an interface against the 30 Laws of UX (Yablonski, 2024), producing per-law compliance scores, a compliance profile, and evidence-chained findings grounded in cognitive psychology, Gestalt perception, and behavioral science.

function.name: hmw-statements
function.description: Generate 'How Might We' statements from research insights following IDEO and Stanford d.school design thinking methodology. Constraint-based framing with scope calibration (not too broad, not too narrow), divergent reframing techniques, and impact/feasibility scoring for prioritization.

function.name: design-system-audit
function.description: Evaluate consistency against design system, identify deviations, accessibility compliance.

function.name: survey-ai-detection
function.description:
Detect AI-generated survey responses using multiple heuristic and statistical methods.

Based on academic research (Wu et al. 2025, Yang et al. 2024):
- Linguistic analysis: perplexity scoring, burstiness, vocabulary diversity
- Response pattern analysis: timing, straightlining, semantic similarity between responses
- Statistical methods: response length distribution, lexical richness (TTR), coherence scores
- Behavioral signals: completion time vs expected, copy-paste indicators, IP/device clustering

function.name: ab-test-analysis
function.description: Plan and analyze online controlled experiments following Kohavi, Tang & Xu's Trustworthy Online Controlled Experiments methodology. Covers hypothesis formulation, sample size calculation (power analysis), minimum detectable effect sizing, guard-rail metric definition, statistical significance testing (frequentist and Bayesian), confidence interval construction, effect size estimation (Cohen's d, relative lift), novelty and primacy effect detection, multiple comparison corrections (Bonferroni, Holm-Bonferroni, Benjamini-Hochberg), segment-level analysis, Sample Ratio Mismatch (SRM) detection, and practical significance assessment for go/no-go decisions.

items.statistical_basis: test, statistic, p-value, CI, effect size

function.name: stitch-react-components
function.description: Convert generated UI screens into production-ready React component systems with design token consistency and validation.

function.name: usability-testing
function.description: Create test scripts, process session data, calculate task success/time/errors, identify patterns.

items.coding_reasoning: why this code applies to this segment

function.name: research-retro
function.description: Analyze research process effectiveness, identify improvements, update team practices.

function.name: interview-question-generator
function.description: Generate research interview questions following Michael Quinn Patton's qualitative question typology (behavior, opinion, feeling, knowledge, sensory, background). Produces structured interview guides with warm-up sequences, core question batteries organized by research theme, probing strategies, and quality validation. Every question annotated with purpose, expected yield, and research objective mapping.

function.name: user-interviews
function.description: Plan, conduct, and analyze semi-structured user interviews following Kvale & Brinkmann's InterViews methodology. Covers interview guide design (funneling technique), active listening prompts, transcript analysis with in-vivo coding, cross-case synthesis, and actionable insight extraction. Supports both generative (discovery) and evaluative (validation) interview types.

function.name: ab-test-analysis
function.description: Plan and analyze online controlled experiments following Kohavi, Tang & Xu's Trustworthy Online Controlled Experiments methodology. Covers hypothesis formulation, sample size calculation (power analysis), minimum detectable effect sizing, guard-rail metric definition, statistical significance testing (frequentist and Bayesian), confidence interval construction, effect size estimation (Cohen's d, relative lift), novelty and primacy effect detection, multiple comparison corrections (Bonferroni, Holm-Bonferroni, Benjamini-Hochberg), segment-level analysis, Sample Ratio Mismatch (SRM) detection, and practical significance assessment for go/no-go decisions.

items.statistical_basis: test, statistic, p-value, CI, effect size

function.name: accessibility-audit
function.description: Plan and execute comprehensive accessibility audits following W3C WCAG 2.2 guidelines and the POUR principles (Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust). Covers conformance level targeting (A/AA/AAA), automated testing tool selection and interpretation, manual testing protocols for keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, cognitive accessibility, and color contrast. Includes assistive technology testing matrix (JAWS, NVDA, VoiceOver, TalkBack), remediation prioritization using severity and user impact scoring, and legal compliance assessment (ADA, Section 508, EN 301 549, EAA).

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: affinity-mapping
function.description: Auto-cluster research nuggets and notes into themes using Kawakita Jiro's KJ Method. Bottom-up inductive clustering with spatial reasoning, relationship mapping, multi-level hierarchy construction, and outlier identification. Every cluster grounded in verbatim evidence from research data.

function.name: analytics-review
function.description: Plan and execute systematic product analytics review following Kaushik's Web Analytics 2.0 framework. Covers funnel analysis with stage-by-stage drop-off diagnosis, cohort analysis for retention and behavioral patterns, user segmentation (behavioral, demographic, technographic), statistical significance testing for observed differences, anomaly detection, conversion path analysis, engagement metric interpretation, and evidence-based UX optimization recommendations. Integrates quantitative analytics with qualitative UX research context.

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: browser-accessibility-check
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation and conduct a focused WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility audit. Produces quantified violation counts, severity classifications, and a prioritized remediation plan with effort estimates.

function.name: browser-competitive-benchmark
function.description: Browse competitor websites using browser automation, systematically capture UX patterns, features, and heuristics, then build a comparative feature matrix with quality ratings and opportunity gap analysis. Integrates Porter's Five Forces with Nielsen's heuristics for UX-grounded competitive intelligence.

function.name: browser-ux-audit
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation, then evaluate its UX against Nielsen's 10 heuristics, WCAG accessibility, and Laws of UX. Produces structured severity-rated findings with evidence chains and actionable recommendations.

function.name: card-sorting
function.description: Analyze open/closed/hybrid card sorts — dendrograms, similarity matrices, IA recommendations.

function.name: journey-mapping
function.description: Build comprehensive end-to-end journey maps following Kalbach's Mapping Experiences framework. Maps phases, actions, touchpoints, channels, emotions, thoughts, pain points, opportunities, and moments of truth. Includes service blueprint elements (frontstage/backstage processes, support systems). Every element grounded in research evidence.

function.name: field-studies
function.description: Plan, conduct, and analyze ethnographic field studies following Emerson, Fretz & Shaw's fieldwork methodology. Covers site selection and access negotiation, participant observation levels (complete observer to complete participant), AEIOU coding framework (Activities, Environments, Interactions, Objects, Users), thick description writing, cultural probe design, behavioral mapping, and grounded theory analysis. Supports both rapid ethnography for time-constrained projects and extended immersion for deep cultural understanding.

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: concept-testing
function.description: Structure concept test protocols, analyze reactions, preference rankings.

function.name: participant-simulation
function.description: Simulate research participant behavior using game-theory strategies (Prisoner's Dilemma, Stag Hunt, bounded rationality, satisficing, social desirability bias). Generates diverse participant cohorts, runs multi-round simulations, and produces behavioral analysis with strategic pattern identification.

function.name: jtbd-analysis
function.description: Extract and analyze Jobs-to-be-Done from research data following Clayton Christensen's JTBD theory and Tony Ulwick's Outcome-Driven Innovation (ODI) framework. Identifies functional, emotional, and social jobs; maps outcome expectations; analyzes switching forces (push, pull, anxiety, habit); and segments opportunities by satisfaction level (over-served, served, under-served, unserved).

function.name: competitive-analysis
function.description: Automated competitor research using browser-use. Evaluates market positioning, feature matrices, and UX patterns.

function.name: research-quality-evaluation
function.description: Formal LLM-as-Judge evaluation of research output quality. Runs adversarial review, dual-run consistency, self-MoA verification, and debate consensus against existing findings. Produces per-dimension scores, chain integrity audit, and overall quality assessment with explicit improvement suggestions.

function.name: affinity-mapping
function.description: Auto-cluster research nuggets and notes into themes using Kawakita Jiro's KJ Method. Bottom-up inductive clustering with spatial reasoning, relationship mapping, multi-level hierarchy construction, and outlier identification. Every cluster grounded in verbatim evidence from research data.

function.name: user-flow-mapping
function.description: Document current-state user flows, identify friction points, map to research findings.

function.name: ab-test-analysis
function.description: Plan and analyze online controlled experiments following Kohavi, Tang & Xu's Trustworthy Online Controlled Experiments methodology. Covers hypothesis formulation, sample size calculation (power analysis), minimum detectable effect sizing, guard-rail metric definition, statistical significance testing (frequentist and Bayesian), confidence interval construction, effect size estimation (Cohen's d, relative lift), novelty and primacy effect detection, multiple comparison corrections (Bonferroni, Holm-Bonferroni, Benjamini-Hochberg), segment-level analysis, Sample Ratio Mismatch (SRM) detection, and practical significance assessment for go/no-go decisions.

items.statistical_basis: test, statistic, p-value, CI, effect size

function.name: accessibility-audit
function.description: Plan and execute comprehensive accessibility audits following W3C WCAG 2.2 guidelines and the POUR principles (Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust). Covers conformance level targeting (A/AA/AAA), automated testing tool selection and interpretation, manual testing protocols for keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, cognitive accessibility, and color contrast. Includes assistive technology testing matrix (JAWS, NVDA, VoiceOver, TalkBack), remediation prioritization using severity and user impact scoring, and legal compliance assessment (ADA, Section 508, EN 301 549, EAA).

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: affinity-mapping
function.description: Auto-cluster research nuggets and notes into themes using Kawakita Jiro's KJ Method. Bottom-up inductive clustering with spatial reasoning, relationship mapping, multi-level hierarchy construction, and outlier identification. Every cluster grounded in verbatim evidence from research data.

function.name: analytics-review
function.description: Plan and execute systematic product analytics review following Kaushik's Web Analytics 2.0 framework. Covers funnel analysis with stage-by-stage drop-off diagnosis, cohort analysis for retention and behavioral patterns, user segmentation (behavioral, demographic, technographic), statistical significance testing for observed differences, anomaly detection, conversion path analysis, engagement metric interpretation, and evidence-based UX optimization recommendations. Integrates quantitative analytics with qualitative UX research context.

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: browser-accessibility-check
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation and conduct a focused WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility audit. Produces quantified violation counts, severity classifications, and a prioritized remediation plan with effort estimates.

function.name: browser-competitive-benchmark
function.description: Browse competitor websites using browser automation, systematically capture UX patterns, features, and heuristics, then build a comparative feature matrix with quality ratings and opportunity gap analysis. Integrates Porter's Five Forces with Nielsen's heuristics for UX-grounded competitive intelligence.

function.name: browser-ux-audit
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation, then evaluate its UX against Nielsen's 10 heuristics, WCAG accessibility, and Laws of UX. Produces structured severity-rated findings with evidence chains and actionable recommendations.

function.name: card-sorting
function.description: Analyze open/closed/hybrid card sorts — dendrograms, similarity matrices, IA recommendations.

function.name: persona-creation
function.description: Synthesize evidence-based personas from research data following Alan Cooper's About Face persona methodology. Behavioral pattern identification, goal-directed design, scenario construction, and anti-persona definition. function.name: taxonomy-generator
function.description: Generate multi-level taxonomies following Heather Hedden's Accidental Taxonomist methodology. Supports faceted classification, controlled vocabularies, hierarchical and polyhierarchical structures, equivalence relationships, and associative relationships. Includes governance framework, MECE validation, and cross-reference mapping across organizational levels.

function.name: browser-competitive-benchmark
function.description: Browse competitor websites using browser automation, systematically capture UX patterns, features, and heuristics, then build a comparative feature matrix with quality ratings and opportunity gap analysis. Integrates Porter's Five Forces with Nielsen's heuristics for UX-grounded competitive intelligence.

function.name: analytics-review
function.description: Plan and execute systematic product analytics review following Kaushik's Web Analytics 2.0 framework. Covers funnel analysis with stage-by-stage drop-off diagnosis, cohort analysis for retention and behavioral patterns, user segmentation (behavioral, demographic, technographic), statistical significance testing for observed differences, anomaly detection, conversion path analysis, engagement metric interpretation, and evidence-based UX optimization recommendations. Integrates quantitative analytics with qualitative UX research context.

function.name: field-studies
function.description: Plan, conduct, and analyze ethnographic field studies following Emerson, Fretz & Shaw's fieldwork methodology. Covers site selection and access negotiation, participant observation levels (complete observer to complete participant), AEIOU coding framework (Activities, Environments, Interactions, Objects, Users), thick description writing, cultural probe design, behavioral mapping, and grounded theory analysis. Supports both rapid ethnography for time-constrained projects and extended immersion for deep cultural understanding.

function.name: ab-test-analysis
function.description: Plan and analyze online controlled experiments following Kohavi, Tang & Xu's Trustworthy Online Controlled Experiments methodology. Covers hypothesis formulation, sample size calculation (power analysis), minimum detectable effect sizing, guard-rail metric definition, statistical significance testing (frequentist and Bayesian), confidence interval construction, effect size estimation (Cohen's d, relative lift), novelty and primacy effect detection, multiple comparison corrections (Bonferroni, Holm-Bonferroni, Benjamini-Hochberg), segment-level analysis, Sample Ratio Mismatch (SRM) detection, and practical significance assessment for go/no-go decisions.

items.statistical_basis: test, statistic, p-value, CI, effect size

function.name: accessibility-audit
function.description: Plan and execute comprehensive accessibility audits following W3C WCAG 2.2 guidelines and the POUR principles (Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust). Covers conformance level targeting (A/AA/AAA), automated testing tool selection and interpretation, manual testing protocols for keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, cognitive accessibility, and color contrast. Includes assistive technology testing matrix (JAWS, NVDA, VoiceOver, TalkBack), remediation prioritization using severity and user impact scoring, and legal compliance assessment (ADA, Section 508, EN 301 549, EAA).

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: affinity-mapping
function.description: Auto-cluster research nuggets and notes into themes using Kawakita Jiro's KJ Method. Bottom-up inductive clustering with spatial reasoning, relationship mapping, multi-level hierarchy construction, and outlier identification. Every cluster grounded in verbatim evidence from research data.

function.name: analytics-review
function.description: Plan and execute systematic product analytics review following Kaushik's Web Analytics 2.0 framework. Covers funnel analysis with stage-by-stage drop-off diagnosis, cohort analysis for retention and behavioral patterns, user segmentation (behavioral, demographic, technographic), statistical significance testing for observed differences, anomaly detection, conversion path analysis, engagement metric interpretation, and evidence-based UX optimization recommendations. Integrates quantitative analytics with qualitative UX research context.

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: browser-accessibility-check
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation and conduct a focused WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility audit. Produces quantified violation counts, severity classifications, and a prioritized remediation plan with effort estimates.

function.name: browser-competitive-benchmark
function.description: Browse competitor websites using browser automation, systematically capture UX patterns, features, and heuristics, then build a comparative feature matrix with quality ratings and opportunity gap analysis. Integrates Porter's Five Forces with Nielsen's heuristics for UX-grounded competitive intelligence.

function.name: browser-ux-audit
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation, then evaluate its UX against Nielsen's 10 heuristics, WCAG accessibility, and Laws of UX. Produces structured severity-rated findings with evidence chains and actionable recommendations.

function.name: card-sorting
function.description: Analyze open/closed/hybrid card sorts — dendrograms, similarity matrices, IA recommendations.

function.name: prioritization-matrix
function.description: Multi-framework prioritization following RICE scoring (Reach, Impact, Confidence, Effort), Kano model classification (must-be, one-dimensional, attractive, indifferent, reverse), MoSCoW categorization, and Impact vs. Effort quadrant mapping. Evidence-based scoring with stakeholder alignment, opportunity cost analysis, and dependency mapping.

function.name: contextual-inquiry
function.description: Plan and analyze contextual inquiry field sessions following Beyer & Holtzblatt's Contextual Design methodology. Observe users in their natural work environment using the master-apprentice model, with structured AEIOU coding (Activities, Environment, Interactions, Objects, Users), work model extraction, and cultural model analysis.

function.name: browser-accessibility-check

function.name: workshop-facilitation

function.name: survey-design
function.description: Design and analyze UX research surveys following Dillman's Tailored Design Method. Covers question construction (Likert scales, semantic differential, ranking, open-ended), response bias mitigation (acquiescence, social desirability, primacy/recency), skip logic design, pilot testing protocols, sample size calculation, distribution strategy, and statistical analysis including cross-tabulation, factor analysis, and thematic coding of open-ended responses.

items.notable: any ceiling/floor effects or unusual patterns

items.text: specific citable data point or quote

function.name: journey-mapping
function.description: Build comprehensive end-to-end journey maps following Kalbach's Mapping Experiences framework. Maps phases, actions, touchpoints, channels, emotions, thoughts, pain points, opportunities, and moments of truth. Includes service blueprint elements (frontstage/backstage processes, support systems). Every element grounded in research evidence.

function.name: stakeholder-interviews
function.description: Plan, conduct, and analyze stakeholder interviews following Sharp, Rogers & Preece's stakeholder analysis framework. Covers stakeholder mapping (power/interest grid), RACI matrix construction, stakeholder persona creation, semi-structured interview guide design for business goals and constraints, cross-stakeholder alignment analysis, assumption mapping, and organizational dynamics extraction. Supports strategic, operational, and end-user stakeholder tiers.

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: research-retro
function.description: Analyze research process effectiveness, identify improvements, update team practices.

function.name: competitive-analysis
function.description: Automated competitor research using browser-use. Evaluates market positioning, feature matrices, and UX patterns.

function.name: ab-test-analysis
function.description: Plan and analyze online controlled experiments following Kohavi, Tang & Xu's Trustworthy Online Controlled Experiments methodology. Covers hypothesis formulation, sample size calculation (power analysis), minimum detectable effect sizing, guard-rail metric definition, statistical significance testing (frequentist and Bayesian), confidence interval construction, effect size estimation (Cohen's d, relative lift), novelty and primacy effect detection, multiple comparison corrections (Bonferroni, Holm-Bonferroni, Benjamini-Hochberg), segment-level analysis, Sample Ratio Mismatch (SRM) detection, and practical significance assessment for go/no-go decisions.

items.statistical_basis: test, statistic, p-value, CI, effect size

function.name: accessibility-audit
function.description: Plan and execute comprehensive accessibility audits following W3C WCAG 2.2 guidelines and the POUR principles (Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust). Covers conformance level targeting (A/AA/AAA), automated testing tool selection and interpretation, manual testing protocols for keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, cognitive accessibility, and color contrast. Includes assistive technology testing matrix (JAWS, NVDA, VoiceOver, TalkBack), remediation prioritization using severity and user impact scoring, and legal compliance assessment (ADA, Section 508, EN 301 549, EAA).

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: affinity-mapping
function.description: Auto-cluster research nuggets and notes into themes using Kawakita Jiro's KJ Method. Bottom-up inductive clustering with spatial reasoning, relationship mapping, multi-level hierarchy construction, and outlier identification. Every cluster grounded in verbatim evidence from research data.

function.name: analytics-review
function.description: Plan and execute systematic product analytics review following Kaushik's Web Analytics 2.0 framework. Covers funnel analysis with stage-by-stage drop-off diagnosis, cohort analysis for retention and behavioral patterns, user segmentation (behavioral, demographic, technographic), statistical significance testing for observed differences, anomaly detection, conversion path analysis, engagement metric interpretation, and evidence-based UX optimization recommendations. Integrates quantitative analytics with qualitative UX research context.

items.evidence_chain: recommendation traces to insights, facts, nuggets

function.name: browser-accessibility-check
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation and conduct a focused WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility audit. Produces quantified violation counts, severity classifications, and a prioritized remediation plan with effort estimates.

function.name: browser-competitive-benchmark
function.description: Browse competitor websites using browser automation, systematically capture UX patterns, features, and heuristics, then build a comparative feature matrix with quality ratings and opportunity gap analysis. Integrates Porter's Five Forces with Nielsen's heuristics for UX-grounded competitive intelligence.

function.name: browser-ux-audit
function.description: Navigate a live website using browser automation, then evaluate its UX against Nielsen's 10 heuristics, WCAG accessibility, and Laws of UX. Produces structured severity-rated findings with evidence chains and actionable recommendations.

function.name: card-sorting
function.description: Analyze open/closed/hybrid card sorts — dendrograms, similarity matrices, IA recommendations.

function.name: research-synthesis
function.description: Generate comprehensive research synthesis reports following Noblit & Hare's meta-ethnography methodology and NNGroup industry standards. Employs reciprocal translation, refutational synthesis, and lines-of-argument synthesis for cross-study pattern identification. Structures findings through the Atomic Research hierarchy (Nuggets to Facts to Insights to Recommendations) with evidence chains, methodology documentation, confidence assessment, and actionable deliverables.

function.name: interview-question-generator
function.description: Generate research interview questions following Michael Quinn Patton's qualitative question typology (behavior, opinion, feeling, knowledge, sensory, background). Produces structured interview guides with warm-up sequences, core question batteries organized by research theme, probing strategies, and quality validation. Every question annotated with purpose, expected yield, and research objective mapping.

items.question: Tell me about a specific time when...
items.purpose: rich narrative data about key moments

function.name: design-system-audit
function.description: Evaluate consistency against design system, identify deviations, accessibility compliance.

function.name: survey-ai-detection
function.description:
Detect AI-generated survey responses using multiple heuristic and statistical methods.

Based on academic research (Wu et al. 2025, Yang et al. 2024):
- Linguistic analysis: perplexity scoring, burstiness, vocabulary diversity
- Response pattern analysis: timing, straightlining, semantic similarity between responses
- Statistical methods: response length distribution, lexical richness (TTR), coherence scores
- Behavioral signals: completion time vs expected, copy-paste indicators, IP/device clustering

function.name: diary-studies
function.description: Design and analyze longitudinal diary studies following Bolger, Davis & Rafaeli's experience sampling methodology. Covers study protocol design, daily/event-based prompt creation, temporal pattern analysis, emotional arc mapping, behavioral sequence tracking, and participant engagement strategies to minimize attrition.

function.name: hmw-statements
function.description: Generate 'How Might We' statements from research insights following IDEO and Stanford d.school design thinking methodology. Constraint-based framing with scope calibration (not too broad, not too narrow), divergent reframing techniques, and impact/feasibility scoring for prioritization.
